name: Wallos
longDescription:
Wallos is a powerful, open-source, self-hostable web app for tracking recurring expenses and subscriptions and visualizing your budget. Never lose track of a subscription renewal again.

Features include a calendar view of upcoming payments, monthly cost statistics, currency conversion, custom subscription logos, and notifications via multiple channels (webhook, email, Telegram, etc.).
description: Track recurring expenses and subscriptions with a budget visualization dashboard.
